name: account-takeover
description: Account takeover using a new device, anomalous IP, credential reset, and high-value payment

name: synthetic-identity
description: Synthetic identity behavior involving new accounts, shared devices, and rapid value movement

name: mule-ring
description: Money mule ring pattern with many incoming payments followed by rapid outbound transfers

name: card-testing
description: Low-value authorization probes followed by higher-value attempted transaction

name: credential-stuffing
description: Multiple failed logins across accounts from shared infrastructure followed by successful payment
